jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Bewakoof
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bewakoof! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bewakoof:
Bewakoof is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bewakoof!
